meaning: n.母马,母驴,月球或火星等表面阴暗区
examples: The mare is due to foal today.
The stupidest questions of all were asked by Mollie, the white mare.
The little mare was young, but thin, with legs planted wide apart and frayed ears.
The professional sailor from Weston-super-Mare is "used to dealing with adversity", according to his father Charles.
"It would be a great thing to win it with a mare, " Mott said.
